# build-commits

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Commits included since the previous build, shown in the build detail pane. Per-run commit list data endpoint.
- Exports (core):
  - Values: `getBuildRunCommits`
- Exports (shared):
  - Values: `getBuildRunCommits`
- Contributes:
  - `BuildDetailSlots.Section` "commits" → `BuildCommitsSection`
- Server:
  - Uses: `build._buildRuns`, `database.db`
  - `GET /api/build/runs/:id/commits`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
